value.found_quote:
Set up monitoring
Learn how to use built-in metrics, custom metrics, and alerts to monitor your agents in Agent Platform.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a "Set up monitoring" guide that uses "built-in metrics, custom metrics, and alerts to monitor your agents in Agent Platform," which directly matches the claim about Agent Monitoring. Additionally, the page is marked as "Preview" under the "Pre-GA Offerings Terms," indicating the feature is in preview/pre-GA status.
